title: rubus × languidus
intro: Rubus × languidus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry cane, is a hybrid plant belonging to the genus Rubus, derived from the cross of Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × languidus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
